en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 9 – Jul 15 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~419 kcal/day, peaking 684 on Tuesday's hack squat and 630 on Monday's 2.2 km pool intervals. Friday (Jul 10) was a rest day (32 kcal); Wednesday (Jul 15) is just starting — swim intervals are planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −833 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Wednesday (Jul 15) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Tuesday's hack squat was the week's heaviest strength day
en.i1: Tuesday's hack squat ran 60 min at avg HR 121 (max 154) for 606 active kcal, and the day's 684 daily active kcal topped the window. Hevy hasn't synced the session yet, so tonnage and per-set HR peaks are still missing — a later refresh will fill them.
en.i2: Aerobic work came from three swims. Monday's 2.2 km interval set was the hardest (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 133, max 155, 64 min) and its 819 kcal was still the week's biggest single-session burn. Sunday's easy 1.0 km (avg HR 121) and Thursday's short 0.8 km alongside the squat (avg HR 111) filled in the easy volume.
en.i3t: Recovery: a long night, but soft autonomics
en.i3: This morning HRV dropped to 32 (−8 vs the previous night, −6 under the 38 average) and RHR rose to 57 — both the weakest readings of the window, the expected dip after Tuesday's hack squat. Sleep itself was long: 8h42 off a 21:28 bedtime, deep nearly doubling to 72m and REM at a window-high 2h00, though the score still eased to 73.
en.i4: Three strength sessions this window: Thursday's squat (59 min, avg HR 108), Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (49 min, avg HR 119, max 149) and Tuesday's hack squat (60 min, avg HR 121, max 154). None is Hevy-logged, so the week carries no tonnage or set-peaks; the Jul 7 hack squat (13,986 kg) remains the last logged lift and has rolled out of the 7-day window.
en.rec: Wednesday's plan calls for swim intervals. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (5h07, ~2,930 active kcal) — three Garmin-only strength sessions (Thursday's squat, Saturday's trap-bar deadlift, Tuesday's hack squat) plus three pool swims (Monday's 2.2 km intervals, Sunday's easy 1 km, Thursday's short 0.8 km). Only Friday was a full rest day. Recovery is the flag this morning: HRV 32 and RHR 57 are the window's weakest, off a long 8h42 night at score 73 — the autonomic cost of Tuesday's lift. The hours and the deep sleep are there, so the session is on, but hold the intervals at moderate effort rather than chasing Monday's 133 avg HR. Next: swim intervals today, squat Thursday, rest Friday.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-09 → 2026-07-15 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 snage · 3 plivanja · samo Garmin (nema Hevy volumena)
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 9.7. – 15.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~419 kcal/dan, vrhunac 684 na utorkovom hack squatu i 630 na ponedjeljkovim bazenskim intervalima 2,2 km. Petak (10.7.) bio je dan odmora (32 kcal); srijeda (15.7.) tek počinje — planirani su bazenski intervali.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −833 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Srijeda (15.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Utorkov hack squat bio je najteži dan snage u tjednu
hr.i1: Utorkov hack squat trajao je 60 min uz prosj. puls 121 (maks 154) i 606 aktivnih kcal, a dnevnih 684 aktivne kcal bilo je najviše u prozoru. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao trening, pa nedostaju tonaža i vrhovi pulsa po seriji — popunit će ih kasniji refresh.
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz tri plivanja. Ponedjeljkov intervalni set 2,2 km bio je najteži (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 133, maks 155, 64 min), a njegovih 819 kcal i dalje je najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu. Nedjeljnih laganih 1,0 km (prosj. puls 121) i četvrtkovih kratkih 0,8 km uz čučanj (prosj. puls 111) popunili su laganu volumenu.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: duga noć, ali slaba autonomika
hr.i3: Jutros je HRV pao na 32 (−8 vs prethodna noć, −6 ispod prosjeka od 38), a RHR porastao na 57 — oboje najslabije vrijednosti u prozoru, očekivan pad nakon utorkovog hack squata. Sam san bio je dug: 8h42 uz lijeganje u 21:28, duboki san gotovo se udvostručio na 72m, a REM je dosegnuo vrhunac prozora od 2h00, iako je ocjena ipak pala na 73.
hr.i4t: Snaga: tri treninga samo u Garminu
hr.i4: Tri treninga snage ovog razdoblja: četvrtkov čučanj (59 min, prosj. puls 108), subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje (49 min, prosj. puls 119, maks 149) i utorkov hack squat (60 min, prosj. puls 121, maks 154). Nijedan nije zabilježen u Hevyju, pa tjedan nema tonaže ni vrhova serija; hack squat od 7.7. (13.986 kg) ostaje zadnji zabilježeni trening i izašao je iz 7-dnevnog prozora.
hr.rec: Srijeda po planu donosi bazenske intervale. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h07, ~2.930 aktivnih kcal) — tri treninga snage samo u Garminu (četvrtkov čučanj, subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje, utorkov hack squat) plus tri bazenska plivanja (ponedjeljkovi intervali 2,2 km, nedjeljnih laganih 1 km, četvrtkovih kratkih 0,8 km). Samo je petak bio potpuni dan odmora. Oporavak je jutros upozorenje: HRV 32 i RHR 57 najslabiji su u prozoru, nakon duge noći od 8h42 uz ocjenu 73 — autonomna cijena utorkovog treninga. Sati i duboki san su tu, pa trening ide, ali drži intervale na umjerenom naporu umjesto da juriš ponedjeljkov prosj. puls 133. Sljedeće: intervali danas, čučanj u četvrtak, odmor u petak.
hr.foot: Podaci: 9.7. → 15.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
